title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Business Post India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Business Post India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Business Post India! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Business Post India:
Business Post India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Business Post India!
